zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Eaton於1650年出生在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆格林藍德時，她的父親Ensign Thomas Eaton11647歲，母親Martha Kent12歲。她和Thomas Peavey Jr至少有2個兒子。她去世於1719年在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Eaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Eaton or Eton, such as Eaton Socon (Bedfordshire), Eaton (Cheshire), or Eton (Buckinghamshire), named from either Old English ēa ‘river’ or ēg ‘island, low-lying land’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: Nathaneal Eaton, born in Coventry, England, c. 1609, came to MA in 1637 and was the first head of Harvard College, in 1638–39.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Eaton was born in 1650, in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, her father, Ensign Thomas Eaton, was 11647 and her mother, Martha Kent, was 12. She had at least 2 sons with Thomas Peavey Jr. She died in 1719, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 69.

ko.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐
ko.lifeSummary: Martha Eaton(이)가 1650년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 그린랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ensign Thomas Eaton(은)는 11647세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Kent(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Peavey Jr(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1719년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Eaton родилась в 1650 г. в местности гринланд, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Ensign Thomas Eaton было 11647 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Kent, 12. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Thomas Peavey Jr. Она умерла в 1719 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 69 лет.
